---
title: "残日留痕 | Residualsun"
pagetitle: "残日留痕 | Residualsun"
subtitle: "一个人的思想史便是他的阅读史"
image: "profile.jpg"
image-alt: "less is more"

about:
  template: solana
  image-width: 28em
  id: hero-heading
page-layout: full

execute: 
  freeze: false
  echo: false
  warning: false
  
header-includes: >
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="assets/index.css">
resources:
  - assets/index.css

#listing:
#  - id: posts
#    contents: "{en,cn}/**/*/index.qmd"
#    sort: "date desc"
#    type: grid
#    image-height: full
#    fields: [image, title, date, author]
#    categories: cloud
#    sort-ui: true
#    filter-ui: true
#    page-size: 3
#  - id: posts-en
#    contents: posts/en/**/*/index.qmd
#    sort: "date desc"
#    type: default
#    image-align: left
#    fields: [image, date, title, author, description]
#    categories: cloud
#    sort-ui: false
#    filter-ui: false
#    page-size: 3
#  - id: posts-cn
#    contents: posts/cn/**/*/index.qmd
#    sort: "date desc"
#    type: grid
#    image-height: full
#    fields: [image, title, author, date]
#    categories: cloud
#    sort-ui: false
#    filter-ui: false
#    page-size: 3
#  - id: r
#    contents: r/**/*/index.qmd
#    sort: "date desc"
#    type: grid
#    fields: [image, date, title, subtitle, author, description]
#    categories: cloud
#    sort-ui: false
#    filter-ui: false
#    page-size: 3
date-format: iso
# title-block-banner: false
# comments: false
# toc: false
# toc-location: right
# back-to-top-navigation: false
---

<br><br>

::: {#hero-heading}
你好，这里是黄国政的主页。

[Learn more about me →](/about){.about-links .subtitle}
:::
